legal.placeholderBanner: Placeholder copy aligned with EU consumer and GDPR requirements. Final legal text will be supplied by Mbody and replace this content before launch.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for shopping at Mbody — EU placeholder until client legal copy is integrated.
terms.title: Terms of Service

introduction.title: 1. Agreement
paragraphs: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Mbody online store and purchases of our products within the European Economic Area (EEA). By placing an order, you agree to these terms.
Mbody sells premium women's activewear directly to consumers (B2C). These terms do not affect your mandatory statutory rights under applicable EU and national consumer law.

orders.title: 2. Orders & Contract
paragraphs: When you complete checkout, you submit an offer to purchase. A binding contract is formed when we send an order confirmation email.
We reserve the right to cancel orders in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock unavailability. You will be notified and refunded promptly if payment was already captured.

pricing.title: 3. Prices & Payment
paragraphs: All prices displayed on the storefront are VAT-inclusive for EU customers, in accordance with Swedish VAT rules (25%) where applicable.
Accepted payment methods will be shown at checkout. Payment processing is handled by our certified payment provider. We do not store full card details on our servers.

shipping.title: 4. Delivery
paragraphs: We ship to countries within our Phase 1 European market. Estimated delivery times and shipping costs are shown before you confirm your order.
Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the address you provide, unless otherwise required by mandatory local law.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Mbody is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of our products or website.
Nothing in these terms limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any liability that cannot be excluded under EU consumer protection law.

law.title: 6. Governing Law & Changes
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Sweden, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protections in your country of residence within the EEA.
We may update these terms. Material changes will be communicated on this page. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.

privacy.metaDescription: How Mbody collects and processes personal data under GDPR — EU placeholder until client legal copy is integrated.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: Mbody is the data controller for personal data collected through this website. Contact details for privacy inquiries are listed at the bottom of this page.
This policy describes how we process data when you browse, create an account, purchase products, or subscribe to marketing communications within the EU/EEA.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data We Collect
paragraphs: Identity & contact: name, email, phone, delivery and billing address.
Order data: products purchased, payment status, shipping updates.
Technical data: IP address, device/browser type, cookies, and analytics events necessary to operate and improve the store.
Marketing preferences: newsletter opt-in status where you have given consent.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal Basis (GDPR Art. 6)
paragraphs: Contract performance — to process orders, deliver goods, and provide customer support.
Legal obligation — tax, accounting, and fraud-prevention requirements.
Legitimate interests — site security, analytics, and service improvement, balanced against your rights.
Consent — marketing emails and non-essential cookies, which you may withdraw at any time.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights
paragraphs: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, or port your personal data, and to object to certain processing.
You may lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority. In Sweden, this is Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten (IMY).
To exercise your rights, contact us using the email below. We respond within one month unless an extension is required.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
paragraphs: We use essential cookies to operate the cart, session, language, and currency preferences.
Analytics and marketing cookies are used only with your consent via our cookie banner. You can change preferences at any time.

transfers.title: 6. Retention & Transfers
paragraphs: We retain order and account data as long as necessary for contractual, legal, and accounting purposes, then delete or anonymize it.
Where data is processed outside the EEA, we rely on appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.

contact.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy requests or questions about this policy, email legal@mbody.com. A dedicated Data Protection contact will be confirmed before launch.

returns.metaDescription: EU withdrawal and return policy for Mbody orders — placeholder until client legal copy is integrated.
returns.title: Returns & Refunds

withdrawal.title: 1. Right of Withdrawal (14 Days)
paragraphs: If you are a consumer in the EU/EEA, you have the right to withdraw from your purchase within 14 days of receiving the goods, without giving a reason.
The withdrawal period expires 14 days after the day on which you, or a third party indicated by you, take physical possession of the goods.

conditions.title: 2. Return Conditions
paragraphs: Items must be returned unused, unworn, and with original tags and packaging where applicable.
Hygiene-sealed products (e.g. underwear or swimwear) cannot be returned once the seal is broken, unless defective.
You are responsible for diminished value resulting from handling beyond what is necessary to establish the nature and functioning of the goods.

process.title: 3. How to Return
paragraphs: Notify us of your decision to withdraw by email before the 14-day period expires. We will provide return instructions and, where applicable, a return label.
Send the goods back without undue delay and within 14 days of notifying us. Proof of postage is recommended.

refunds.title: 4. Refunds
paragraphs: We refund all payments received, including standard delivery costs, within 14 days of receiving the returned goods or proof of return.
Refunds are made using the same payment method unless you agree otherwise. We may withhold reimbursement until we receive the goods or evidence of return.
You bear the direct cost of returning goods unless the item is faulty or we have offered free returns for your order.

defective.title: 5. Faulty or Incorrect Items
paragraphs: If you receive a defective or wrong item, contact us within a reasonable time. Your statutory warranty rights under EU consumer law apply in addition to this policy.
We will arrange repair, replacement, or refund as appropriate. Return shipping for faulty goods is at our expense.

exceptions.title: 6. Exceptions
paragraphs: The right of withdrawal does not apply to custom-made or personalized products, sealed goods not suitable for return due to health protection, or perishable goods, as permitted by Directive 2011/83/EU.
Final return rules and any extended voluntary return window will be confirmed in the client-provided policy before launch.
